channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mpumalanga livestock farmer survives lion attack while searching for missing cow
item.description: A Mpumalanga man from Mdlankomo in KaBokweni has recounted a terrifying encounter with a lion while searching for his missing livestock. Muzi Mthombothi said he had only just returned from work when h...

item.title: How a severe neck injury ended Sterling Sharpe’s NFL career at its peak
item.description: Sterling Sharpe, a former American football wide receiver for the Green Bay Packers, saw his promising NFL career cut short due to a serious neck injury. He played in the league for seven seasons betw...

item.title: IHC issues stay order preventing CDA from evicting One Constitution Avenue residents
item.description: The Islamabad High Court (IHC) on Monday issued a stay order restraining the Capital Development Authority (CDA) from taking any coercive action or dispossessing the residents of One Constitution Aven...

item.title: NWU academic calls for STEM education focused on ethics, critical thinking and responsible innovation
item.description: Dr Paul Iwuanyanwu from the School of Mathematics, Science and Technology Education at North-West University argues that STEM education must move beyond rote learning, procedural accuracy and examinat...

item.title: Western Kenya leaders push for Deputy President position ahead of Ruto’s 2027 re-election bid
item.description: Leaders from Western Kenya have stepped up their political demands, calling for the region to be considered for the Deputy President position in President William Ruto’s anticipated 2027 re-election c...

item.title: Suspect shot dead after opening fire at White House security checkpoint; bystander seriously injured
item.description: A shooting incident outside the White House has left a bystander seriously injured and the suspect dead, according to US authorities. The suspect has been identified as 21-year-old Nasire Best, who wa...

item.title: How antibiotics affect your gut microbiome and why probiotics may not be the solution
item.description: In this Wellness column, a gastroenterologist addresses a common question from patients who are prescribed antibiotics: whether they should also take probiotic supplements to protect their gut health....

item.title: Marco Rubio says India did not raise concerns over Pakistan’s mediation role in US–Iran engagement
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio stated in New Delhi that India did not express any concerns regarding Pakistan’s reported role as a mediator or facilitator in the ongoing diplomatic exchanges betwee...

item.title: Ugandan preacher surprised by strong Arsenal fan celebrations in Uganda after EPL win
item.description: Ugandan preacher Apostle Grace Lubega has drawn attention after expressing surprise at the huge passion shown by Arsenal fans in Uganda following the club’s long-awaited English Premier League triumph...

item.title: Nigeria tops African Open with 49 medals as Onyinyechi sets new world record
item.description: Nigeria show very strong performance at the African Open Championships, finishing the competition with an impressive total of 49 medals across different events. The team’s overall performance place th...

item.title: Malkajgiri police trace dacoity gang using SDR analysis and multi-city digital tracking
item.description: The Malkajgiri police in Hyderabad successfully traced and arrested members of a violent dacoity gang within four days by using advanced digital investigation techniques, marking a shift towards techn...

item.title: Bandit attack on Yashikira community in Kwara State leads to abduction and arson at Emir’s palace
item.description: Suspected armed bandits on Sunday night attacked Yashikira community in Baruten Local Government Area of Kwara State, Nigeria, in a violent raid that left residents in fear and confusion. According to...

item.title: Parliament Finalises Public Participation on Finance Bill 2026 Amid Proposed New Taxes and Digital Reforms
item.description: Kenya’s National Assembly is expected to conclude public participation hearings on the Finance Bill 2026 after the expiry of a two-week submission period that allowed wananchi, industry players and st...

item.title: DENR assures strict safeguards and reforestation measures for tree-cutting projects in Manila and Palawan
item.description: The Department of Environment and Natural Resources (DENR) has assured the public that strict environmental safeguards and rehabilitation measures are being implemented for ongoing tree-cutting activi...

item.title: Rising Anti-Immigrant Protests in Durban and Johannesburg Raise Concerns Ahead of Local Elections
item.description: The article examines the growing use of anti-immigrant sentiment in South African politics, particularly in Durban and Johannesburg, where protests linked to the March and March movement have intensif...

item.title: Evosha Energies opens new fuel station in Mbezi to improve fuel access in Dar es Salaam
item.description: Residents and transport operators in Mbezi and surrounding areas in Dar es Salaam have received improved access to fuel services following the official launch of the Evosha Energies Fuel Station at Mb...

item.title: Lola Young debuts James Blake collaboration ‘From Down Here’ live at Radio 1’s Big Weekend
item.description: Lola Young has performed her newly released collaboration with James Blake, titled ‘From Down Here’, live for the first time at BBC Radio 1’s Big Weekend in Herrington Country Park. The track was offi...

item.title: Hiker critically injured and airlifted from Runyon Canyon in Hollywood Hills rescue operation
item.description: A 40-year-old man was airlifted by helicopter from Runyon Canyon in the Hollywood Hills on Sunday morning after suffering a serious medical emergency while hiking. According to the Los Angeles Fire De...

item.title: Tribute reflects on Neale Daniher’s life, AFL career and battle with motor neurone disease
item.description: A video feature by 9News Melbourne revisits the life and legacy of former AFL figure Neale Daniher, focusing on his influence both within football and through his public fight against motor neurone di...

item.title: U.S. and Iran temper expectations as negotiations over ceasefire and Strait of Hormuz continue
item.description: Iran and the United States have both downplayed expectations of an imminent breakthrough in ongoing negotiations aimed at ending a three-month-old conflict and addressing tensions in the Middle East. ...
